TheCherishedPrinceofHandan[邯鄲懷王] was[Cao] Yong. In the second year of theera [221], he was enfeoffed asDukeofHuainan[淮南公], andJiujiang commandery[九江郡] became part of his fiefdom. In the third year [222], he was promoted toPrinceofHuainan[淮南王]. In the fourth year [223], he changed fief toChen[陳]. In the sixth year [225], he changed fief toHandan[邯鄲]. In the third year of theera [229], he died. In the fifth year [231],[Cao] Wen, the son ofPrinceofRencheng[任城王],[Cao] Kai, inherited the succession of[Cao] Yong. In the sixth year, he changed fief toLuyang[魯陽]. During the,, anderas, the fief gradually increased, joining with the previous for a total of four thousand and four hundred households.
